## Meeting Purpose

[Provide company-wide updates on new hires, sales, product development, and client delivery processes.](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Company achieved record sales, doubling ARR and exceeding $10M run rate](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [New ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) framework implemented to better target and serve clients](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Engineering team working on 6 major product initiatives to improve Atlas platform and AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Cloud projects being used to prototype and refine client-specific content generation processes](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)

## Topics

### New Hires and Celebrations

  - [Welcomed 3 new hires: Tyler Pavlas (Sales), Stevie Kim (Product), Iana Medvedeva (AI Content)](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Celebrated exceptional work of Marisol, Ada, Nika, and Adé](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Announced George's promotion to Chief of Staff](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Sales and Financial Updates

  - [Closed major deals with Clerk, Deepgram, Alex.com, Understory, HockeyStack](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Signed $2.7M deal with Anthropic, largest in company history](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [August projections show \>$10M run rate, ARR close behind](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [No churn/cancellations in August, first time ever](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) Framework

  - [Developed to better segment and prioritize clients](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Evaluates decision-making, financial health, content foundation, strategic alignment](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Clients scored 0-5 in each area, aiming for 50+ total score](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Framework to be implemented in HubSpot for ongoing triage](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

### Product Development Initiatives

  - [Knowledge base for private data and common topics](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2138.0)
  - [Content inventory to replace Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
  - [Analytics dashboard to replace Looker](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2290.0)
  - [API for internal reporting and bottleneck identification](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2336.0)
  - [Agentic AI workflows for improved content generation](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2364.0)
  - [Self-serve SEO product in planning stages](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2438.0)

### Cloud Projects for Client Delivery

  - [Used to prototype and refine client-specific content processes](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
  - [Example: Biologica ingredient integration workflow](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2660.0)
  - [Successful prototypes get ticketed for engineering to productize](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2789.0)
  - [Helps close gap between pipeline output and client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue refining ICP framework and implementing in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [Progress 6 major product initiatives, especially content inventory and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Team members encouraged to prototype solutions via Cloud projects](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=3467.0)
  - [Document and ticket successful prototypes for engineering productization](https://fathom.video/share/3uHGmV26S9UNSJ_bNmpyfenRWR8hynoz?tab=summary&timestamp=3504.0)
